sidebar.name: Manav Garg
sidebar.bio:
Motivated by curiosity and driven by data —
I combine code, creativity, and critical
thinking to build intelligent systems and
explore the frontier of AI.

quote.text:
Errors using inadequate data are much less
than those using no data at all
quote.author: Charles Babbage

company.name: IHX Pvt. Ltd. - A Perfios Company

sidebar.currentlyReading: The Laws of Human Nature - Robert Greene

paragraphs: Manav is a 21-year-old Software Developer and Machine Learning Engineer with expertise in graphic design and UI/UX. He possesses proficiency in multiple programming languages and technologies, including Python, Java, JavaScript, C/C++, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-Learn, Django, React, and Figma.

His technical competencies extend to natural language processing, computer vision, data mining, and big data analytics. Manav demonstrates exceptional motivation and results-oriented work ethics, consistently exhibiting a collaborative mindset and an insatiable appetite for knowledge acquisition.
achievements: Secured a global rank within the top 3,000 in the all-India VIT entrance examination
Developed strong communication and presentation skills complemented by an analytical mindset
Established expertise in Data Structures, Algorithms, and Modern ML techniques
Mastered full-stack development capabilities with end-to-end API integration
Demonstrated proficiency in Python ML libraries including TensorFlow and OpenCV
Cultivated professional skills in UI/UX design using Figma, Adobe Photoshop, and Illustrator
professionalInterests: Manav is deeply fascinated by the potential of data-driven technologies to address real-world challenges and facilitate intelligent decision-making through automation and insight.
He aspires to contribute to research-oriented projects, with particular emphasis on practical ML applications, model interpretability, and responsible AI implementation.

Currently exploring domains such as natural language processing, computer vision, and reinforcement learning, while simultaneously strengthening his foundation in statistics, algorithms, and data analysis.

His professional objective is to develop into a comprehensive machine learning engineer and data scientist, equipped with the technical capabilities to work on both production-grade systems and experimental prototypes.
about.beyondTechnology: Manav is also a self-taught designer, enthusiastic gamer, casual culinary enthusiast, and visual thinker — he firmly believes that creative expression complements and enhances analytical thinking in technology environments.

bullets: Worked on tariff digitization initiatives.
Led comprehensive data mining, preparation, and cleansing processes.
Developed and trained custom model architectures, including but not limited to YOLO, Donut, and Custom Encoder-Decoder Models, as well as using RAG + LLM based pipelines.
Reduced data processing time from 24-36 hours to 4-5 hours using preprocessing and postprocessing techniques and finely constructed datasets.
Implemented robust backend APIs and deployment engines enabling scalable production deployment of machine learning solutions.
Introduced asynchronous processing to help APIs scale in production environments and handle large traffic volumes, drastically reducing downtime risk.
Led cost-optimization initiatives that reduced overall infrastructure and pipeline operating costs by 20–25% through workload restructuring and resource-efficient automation.
Optimized and deployed AWS services for scalable self-hosted model deployments and improved compute efficiency.
Performed extensive data cleaning, resolved ETL workflow issues, and restructured data lakes to ensure reliability, consistency, and accessibility.
Built analytics workflows and metric dashboards using Amazon QuickSight, enabling data-driven decision-making for business teams and investors.
